name: Fox Ridge Golf Course
about: Fox Ridge Golf Course is a public golf facility located in Helena, Montana, featuring both an 18-hole Championship Course and a Par 3 Course. The venue offers traditional outdoor golf on nearly 200 acres with scenic views of the surrounding mountains and valleys. While the website prominently lists a Golf Simulator amenity, it provides no specific details regarding the simulator's technology, branding, or user experience. The facility also includes a pro shop, a driving range, dining options through the Red Fox Supper Club, and a full-service restaurant. The course is open to the public and hosts leagues, lessons, and events, making it a versatile location for golfers of all skill levels. It is family-friendly, with junior programs and discounted rates for juniors, and operates on a pay-per-play model for both the championship and Par 3 courses.
why_golfers_like_it: Public access course with two distinct course layouts for variety
On-site golf simulator for practice and play when weather is unfavorable
Comprehensive practice facilities including a driving range and professional lessons
Scenic mountain and valley views provide a serene golfing environment
Red Fox restaurant and bar offer convenient dining with a scenic view

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service restaurant available through the Red Fox Supper Club
On-site bar available at the Red Fox restaurant

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While not explicitly stated, the facility offers club rentals as a listed amenity, suggesting you can rent clubs if needed.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, as the venue has an on-site restaurant and bar (Red Fox Supper Club), it is likely a bring-your-own-booze (BYOB) policy does not apply.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the average time for an 18-hole round on the Championship Course.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is kid-friendly. They offer a Junior Golf Academy and discounted green fees for juniors aged 6-14.
